data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for event-to-delivery lineage for auditability.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the event-to-delivery lineage for auditability, but the evidence provided does not include any direct checks or validations related to this requirement. While there are multiple successful steps related to bookings and member actions, none of them explicitly demonstrate the existence or validation of lineage tracking that ensures auditability. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of event-to-delivery lineage for auditability.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
